{% set lhead = frappe.db.get_value("Letter Head", {"is_default": 1}, "content") %} {{ lhead or "" }}
{{ _("Leave Application Form") }}
# {{ _("ID") }}: {{ doc.name }} | {{ _("Posting Date") }}: {{ doc.get_formatted("posting_date") }}
{{ _("Employee Information") }}
{% set emp = frappe.get_doc("Employee", doc.employee) if doc.employee else None %} {% set direct_manager = frappe.get_doc("Employee", doc.custom_direct_manager_employee) if doc.custom_direct_manager_employee else None %} {% set substitute_emp = frappe.get_doc("Employee", doc.custom_substitute_employee) if doc.custom_substitute_employee else None %}
{{ _("Employee Name") }}: {{ doc.employee_name or "" }} {{ _("Department") }}: {{ doc.department or "" }}
{{ _("Designation") }}: {{ (emp.designation if emp else doc.designation) or "" }} {{ _("Direct Supervisor") }}: {{ direct_manager.employee_name if direct_manager else "________________" }}
{{ _("Phone Number") }}: {{ emp.cell_number if emp and emp.cell_number else "________________" }} {{ _("Home Address") }}: {{ emp.current_address if emp and emp.current_address else "________________" }}
{{ _("Leave Duration & Type") }}
{{ _("From Date") }}: {{ doc.get_formatted("from_date") or "" }} {{ _("To Date") }}: {{ doc.get_formatted("to_date") or "" }}
{{ _("Total Leave Days") }}: {{ doc.total_leave_days or "0" }} {{ _("Leave Balance Before") }}: {{ doc.leave_balance or "0" }}
{{ _("المتبقي بعد الادخال") }}: {{ ((doc.leave_balance or 0) - (doc.total_leave_days or 0)) }} {{ _("Return Date") }}: {% if doc.to_date %} {{ frappe.utils.get_datetime(frappe.utils.add_days(doc.to_date, 1)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }} {% else %} ________________ {% endif %}
{{ _("Leave Type") }}: {{ _(doc.leave_type) if doc.leave_type else "" }}
{{ _("Replacement / Acting Employee") }}
{{ _("Employee Name") }}: {{ substitute_emp.employee_name if substitute_emp else "____________________________" }} {{ _("Status") }}: {{ doc.custom_substitute_approval or "Pending" }}
{% set substitute_user_fullname = frappe.get_fullname(doc.custom_substitute_user) if doc.custom_substitute_user else "" %} {% set direct_manager_user_fullname = frappe.get_fullname(doc.custom_direct_manager_user) if doc.custom_direct_manager_user else "" %} {% set hr_user_fullname = frappe.get_fullname(doc.modified_by) if doc.workflow_state == "Approved" and doc.modified_by else "" %}
{{ frappe.get_fullname(doc.owner) }}

{{ _("Employee Signature") }}

{% if doc.custom_substitute_approval == "Approved" or doc.workflow_state in ["Waiting for Direct Manager Approval", "Waiting for HR Manager Approval", "Approved"] %} {{ substitute_user_fullname }} {% else %} {% endif %}

{{ _("Substitute Employee") }}

{% if doc.custom_direct_manager_approval == "Approved" or doc.workflow_state in ["Waiting for HR Manager Approval", "Approved"] %} {{ direct_manager_user_fullname }} {% else %} {% endif %}

{{ _("Direct Manager") }}

{% if doc.workflow_state == "Approved" %} {{ hr_user_fullname }} {% else %} {% endif %}

{{ _("HR Department") }}
{{ _("Printed by:") }}: {{ frappe.get_fullname(frappe.session.user) }}
{{ _("Print Date:") }}: {{ frappe.utils.now_datetime().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') }}
name: Masar Leave Application Form
